manifests.contents:
bench = []
test = []
example = []

[[bin]]
path = "src/main.rs"
name = "openchat"
test = true
doctest = true
bench = true
doc = true
plugin = false
proc-macro = false
harness = true
edition = "2021"
required-features = []

[package]
name = "openchat"
edition = "2021"
version = "0.0.1"
autobins = true
autoexamples = true
autotests = true
autobenches = true

[dependencies]
futures = "0.3.28"
tracing = "0.1.37"

[dependencies.axum]
version = "0.6.18"
features = ["ws"]

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.28.0"
features = ["full"]

[dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
version = "0.3.17"
features = ["env-filter"]

skeleton.lock_file:
version = 3
